name: invinoveritas
_doc: Checks a LIVE published invinoveritas verdict against the three invariants in one no-auth fetch: GET /ledger/{entry}/commitment returns the signed Nostr verdict event (admission + canonical envelope = the recomputable event id) AND the Bitcoin OTS anchor (anchoring). Entry 28 is a stable Bitcoin-confirmed entry; swap for any /ledger entry. The committed-sample mapping (invinoveritas.mapping.json) is kept for the offline demo.
